rationale: Educ. Code §48.108 establishes early education allotments based on basic allotment and student ADA counts. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or property tax values, so no direct textual conflict arises.
quote: For each student in average daily attendance in kindergarten through third grade, a school district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the basic allotment multiplied by 0.01.
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district property tax revenue is not a textual conflict with §48.108's allotment formulas.
